overview: Mono-Red Kiln Fiend is a Pauper spellslinger aggro deck that relies on casting numerous instants and sorceries to pump its namesake creature. By synergizing with other creatures like Festival Crasher and Satyr Hoplite, it aims to race opponents and deal lethal damage quickly. The deck functions as a combo-style aggro list, requiring specific pieces to execute turn 2 kills or overwhelm the board.
win_conditions: Kiln Fiend dealing lethal damage after being pumped by instants and sorceries
Festival Crasher blocking and attacking with buffs
Satyr Hoplite growing via Heroic and early spells
Mutagenic Growth or Temur Battle Rage finishing the game

keep_criteria: Hands with creatures and a balanced land count
Hands that can set up a Turn 2 Kill

examples.reason: Can set up a Turn 2 Kill or play Kiln Fiend on turn 2 depending on the opponent

early_game: Play Satyr Hoplite on turn 1 and pump it with Rite of Flame and Furor of the Bitten
Cast Kiln Fiend on turn 2 to establish a major threat
mid_game: Continuously cast instants and sorceries to buff Kiln Fiend and Festival Crasher
Use Apostle's Blessing for protection or evasion as needed
late_game: Leverage Ancestral Anger which gets better as the game goes on
Use Mutagenic Growth or Temur Battle Rage to secure lethal damage

key_cards.name: Kiln Fiend
key_cards.notes: Gets +3/+0 until end of turn whenever you cast instants or sorceries

key_cards.name: Festival Crasher
key_cards.notes: Similar to Kiln Fiend, blocks bigger creatures and gets buffed by spells

key_cards.name: Satyr Hoplite
key_cards.notes: 1-drop with Heroic that adds +1/+1 counters when targeted by spells

key_cards.name: Furor of the Bitten
key_cards.notes: Excellent way to make Satyr Hoplite gigantic in the first few turns

key_cards.name: Rite of Flame
key_cards.notes: Can be used on turn 1 to enable Furor of the Bitten

key_cards.name: Ancestral Anger
key_cards.notes: Gets better as the game goes on

key_cards.name: Mutagenic Growth
key_cards.notes: Can deal extra damage or lethal in some situations as a free spell

key_cards.name: Apostle's Blessing
key_cards.notes: Gives protection or evasion depending on the situation

key_cards.name: Temur Battle Rage
key_cards.notes: Always ends the game if your creatures are big enough

sequencing_tips: Cast instants and sorceries before attacking to maximize Kiln Fiend's power
Use Rite of Flame on turn 1 to enable Furor of the Bitten for Satyr Hoplite
Play creatures before opponents get access to a lot of mana to avoid counters
Use Apostle's Blessing for protection or evasion depending on the board state

matchups.advice: Race them and be careful when they play Burn on your creatures
Use the first few turns to finish the game and race them before they stabilize
Side in Pyroblasts and play creatures before they get mana to avoid counters
Be quick, use the Hot Dogs strategy, and don't give them time to recover
Follow your main game plan, be fast, and don't let them build their board

overview_evidence.evidence_span: this is a spellslinger aggro deck

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: Kiln Fiend will be able to deal lethal damage very quickly
Festival Crasher is very similar to Kiln Fiend because it can block creatures that are slightly bigger and also gets a buff
Satyr Hoplite is this deck's designated 1-drop and has the Heroic ability
Mutagenic Growth... deal lethal damage... Battle Rage... always ends the game for you

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: get as much as you can from this synergy by playing numerous spells and buffing its power
You can even do this on turn 1 if you have Rite of Flame in hand
always try to play your creatures before your opponent gets access to a lot of mana
The first one gives you protection or evasion, depending on the situation

common_threats_evidence.evidence_span: careful when they play Burn on your creatures
Apostle's Blessing is great against your opponent's Snuff Out
Hydroblast s could become an issue. Delver also helps this deck's control game plan
Their colorless Eldrazi tokens and Writhing Chrysalis itself are a problem
